zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippine Michiel de Harnes於1210年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈內斯時，她的父親Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI30歲，母親Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE30歲。她於1230年11月11日與Hugues IV d'Antoing結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippine Michiel de Harnes于1210年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈內斯时，她的父亲Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI30岁，母亲Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE30岁。她于1230年11月11日与Hugues IV d'Antoing结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably a nickname for a noisy person, from Middle High German har(e)n ‘call, shout’ + -er, agent suffix.

nameMeanings.name: Philippine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Michiel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippine Michiel de Harnes was born in 1210, in Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI, was 30 and her mother, Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, was 30. She married Hugues IV d'Antoing on 11 November 1230. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1261.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippine Michiel de Harnes est née en 1210, à Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues IV d'Antoing le 11 novembre 1230. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1261.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippine Michiel de Harnes 1210 in Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI 30 und ihre Mutter Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE 30. Sie hat am 11. November 1230 Hugues IV d'Antoing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1261.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippine Michiel de Harnes è nata il nel 1210 nel Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Hugues IV d'Antoing il 11 novembre 1230. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1261.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippine Michiel de Harnesが1210年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスハーンスで生まれた時，父Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VIは30歳，母Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELEは30歳であった。1230年11月11日にHugues IV d'Antoingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippine Michiel de Harnes(이)가 1210년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 하른스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1230년 11월 11일 Hugues IV d'Antoing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippine Michiel de Harnes nasceu em 1210, em Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues IV d'Antoing em 11 de novembro de 1230. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1261.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippine Michiel de Harnes родилась в 1210 г. в местности харнесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues IV d'Antoing 11 ноября 1230 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1261 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippine Michiel de Harnes nació en 1210, en Harnes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Michel DE HARNES-DE BOULERS VI, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatrix DE COURTRAI DE NEVELE DE GAND-DE GAVRE DE NEVELE, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hugues IV d'Antoing el 11 de noviembre de 1230. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1261.
